sections.paragraph:
στοιχεῖον, ου, τό [στοῖχος; one item in a στοῖχος ‘series, row’] ‘part of a complex whole’, element, part

—a. in physical sense 2 Pt 3:10, 12.

—b. by ext. of a

—α. mis-cellaneous rules or basic instruction Gal 4:3, 9; Hb 5:12.

—β. of cosmic powers in their multitudinous aspect Col 2:8, 20.
